mapper.insert: insert into alarm_stop_event (alarm_cid, stop_time, event_status, retry_count, last_error, created_time, updated_time) values (#{alarmCid}, #{stopTime}, 'PENDING', 0, null, now(), now()) on duplicate key update stop_time = greatest(stop_time, values(stop_time)), event_status = if(event_status = 'APPLIED', event_status, 'PENDING'), retry_count = if(event_status = 'APPLIED', retry_count, 0), last_error = if(event_status = 'APPLIED', last_error, null), updated_time = now()
mapper.select: select * from alarm_stop_event where alarm_cid = #{alarmCid} and event_status = 'PENDING' limit 1

select * from alarm_stop_event where alarm_cid = #{alarmCid} and ( event_status = 'PENDING' or (event_status = 'FAILED' and last_error = 'ROUTE_MISSING') ) order by case when event_status = 'PENDING' then 0 else 1 end, id limit 1

select * from alarm_stop_event where event_status = 'PENDING' and alarm_cid in
#{alarmCid}

select * from alarm_stop_event where ( event_status = 'PENDING' or (event_status = 'FAILED' and last_error = 'ROUTE_MISSING') ) and alarm_cid in
#{alarmCid}
select * from alarm_stop_event where event_status = 'PENDING' order by created_time, id limit #{limit}
select * from alarm_stop_event where event_status = 'FAILED' and last_error = 'ROUTE_MISSING' and updated_time <= #{recoverAfter} order by updated_time, id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update alarm_stop_event set event_status = 'APPLIED', applied_time = now(), delete_after = #{deleteAfter}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id}

update alarm_stop_event set event_status = 'APPLIED', applied_time = now(), delete_after = #{deleteAfter}, updated_time = now() where id in
#{id}
update alarm_stop_event set retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and event_status = 'PENDING'
update alarm_stop_event set event_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and event_status = 'PENDING'

update alarm_stop_event set retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where event_status = 'PENDING' and id in
#{id}

update alarm_stop_event set event_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_time = now() where event_status = 'PENDING' and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from alarm_stop_event where event_status = 'PENDING'
